audit_plans.name: 2025 Annual Audit Plan
audit_plans.description: Risk-based audit plan addressing revenue recognition complexity, AI product controls, HIPAA compliance, commercial effectiveness, and Series D readiness
audit_plans.risk_assessment_basis: Enterprise risk assessment completed Q4 2024 with board approval January 2025

audit_plans.name: 2026 Annual Audit Plan - Draft
audit_plans.description: Preliminary audit plan incorporating lessons learned from 2025, expanded AI/ML controls coverage, and public company readiness assessment
audit_plans.risk_assessment_basis: Q4 2025 enterprise risk assessment in progress

audit_findings.title: Insufficient Documentation for Multi-Element Revenue Arrangements
audit_findings.criteria: ASC 606-10-25 requires identification of distinct performance obligations and allocation of transaction price using standalone selling prices
audit_findings.condition: Review of 15 AI tier contracts identified 8 (53%) lacking complete standalone selling price documentation for distinct performance obligations
audit_findings.cause: Rapid AI tier rollout outpaced revenue accounting policy updates; sales contracts did not clearly delineate AI feature pricing from base subscription
audit_findings.effect: Potential misallocation of $2.3M in AI tier revenue across performance obligations; risk of restatement if material
audit_findings.recommendation: Update revenue recognition policy for AI tier, establish SSP documentation requirements, implement contract review checklist
audit_findings.management_response: Agreed. New AI tier revenue recognition policy drafted and under legal review. Target implementation Q2 2025

audit_findings.title: Inadequate Usage-Based Billing Controls
audit_findings.criteria: Usage-based billing requires automated metering, threshold alerts, and reconciliation to customer contracts
audit_findings.condition: AI tier usage metering relies on manual data extraction from product analytics; no automated reconciliation to billing system
audit_findings.cause: Usage-based pricing component added without corresponding billing system integration
audit_findings.effect: 2 customers identified with billing discrepancies totaling $47K; potential revenue leakage estimated at $150K annually
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement automated metering integration between product analytics and billing system; establish monthly reconciliation control
audit_findings.management_response: Automated integration deployed May 2025. Monthly reconciliation added to close procedures

audit_findings.title: AI Model Validation Documentation Gaps
audit_findings.criteria: AI/ML models require documented validation including training data provenance, bias testing, accuracy metrics, and ongoing monitoring thresholds
audit_findings.condition: 3 of 5 AI models in production lack complete validation documentation; bias testing performed but not documented per policy
audit_findings.cause: ML engineering team prioritized speed-to-market; documentation requirements not enforced during rapid feature rollout
audit_findings.effect: FDA SaMD submission risk; potential clinical decision support accuracy issues; reputational damage if model failures occur
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement AI model validation checklist; require documentation sign-off before production deployment; conduct retrospective documentation for existing models
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. Model validation framework under development with target completion July 2025. Retrospective documentation 80% complete

audit_findings.title: Insufficient AI Feature Customer Success Metrics
audit_findings.criteria: Customer success programs require defined success metrics, usage tracking, and proactive intervention triggers
audit_findings.condition: AI tier customer success relies on general platform metrics; no AI-specific adoption or value realization tracking in place
audit_findings.cause: Customer success team not trained on AI features; metrics framework not extended for new product tier
audit_findings.effect: Unable to measure AI tier ROI; churn risk for 134 AI customers unquantified; NRR impact unclear
audit_findings.recommendation: Define AI-specific success metrics; implement usage dashboards; establish intervention triggers at defined adoption thresholds
audit_findings.management_response: Agreed. AI customer success playbook in development. Beta metrics dashboard deployed for top 20 AI customers

audit_findings.title: Clinical Decision Support Disclaimer Inconsistency
audit_findings.criteria: FDA guidance requires clear disclaimers for clinical decision support tools that are not intended to replace clinical judgment
audit_findings.condition: Review of product UI identified 2 screens where CDS disclaimer was not prominently displayed per FDA guidance
audit_findings.cause: UI update deployed without legal/regulatory review; disclaimer placement not included in design checklist
audit_findings.effect: Potential FDA enforcement risk; liability exposure if clinical decisions made without proper disclaimer visibility
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement UI change control requiring regulatory review; remediate identified screens immediately; audit all CDS-related UI
audit_findings.management_response: Immediate remediation completed. UI change control process updated to require regulatory sign-off

audit_findings.title: PHI Access Logging Gap in AI Module
audit_findings.criteria: HIPAA Security Rule §164.312(b) requires audit controls recording and examining activity in systems containing PHI
audit_findings.condition: AI module batch processing jobs accessing PHI not captured in standard access logging; discovered 30-day gap in audit trail
audit_findings.cause: Batch processing framework uses different logging mechanism than interactive API; integration oversight during AI module deployment
audit_findings.effect: Unable to demonstrate complete audit trail for PHI access during 30-day period; HIPAA compliance gap
audit_findings.recommendation: Extend access logging to batch processing; implement log completeness monitoring; conduct gap remediation with documentation
audit_findings.management_response: Logging extended to batch processing. Gap documented and root cause analysis completed. No evidence of unauthorized access during gap period

audit_findings.title: Pipeline Forecasting Accuracy Below Threshold
audit_findings.criteria: Sales forecasting accuracy should be within ±15% of actual results for reliable financial planning
audit_findings.condition: Q1-Q2 2025 forecast accuracy averaged 71% (29% variance); enterprise segment particularly weak at 58% accuracy
audit_findings.cause: Over-reliance on sales rep judgment; insufficient pipeline stage conversion rate analytics; enterprise deal complexity not factored
audit_findings.effect: Financial planning unreliability; cash flow forecasting errors; board reporting credibility concerns
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement data-driven forecasting model; establish stage-specific conversion rates; require deal-level probability justification
audit_findings.management_response: New forecasting methodology piloted Q3 with improved accuracy. Full rollout planned Q4

audit_findings.title: Quota Setting Process Lacks Market Validation
audit_findings.criteria: Sales quotas should be set based on market opportunity analysis, historical performance, and capacity planning
audit_findings.condition: 2024-2025 quotas set primarily on growth targets without bottoms-up market sizing or capacity analysis
audit_findings.cause: Board pressure for aggressive growth; insufficient market intelligence function; limited historical data for AI tier
audit_findings.effect: 18-month quota underperformance pattern; sales team morale impact; turnover risk in enterprise segment
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement quota setting framework incorporating TAM analysis, historical win rates, and capacity constraints
audit_findings.management_response: External market sizing engagement underway. New quota methodology for 2026 planning cycle

audit_findings.title: Privileged Access Review Frequency
audit_findings.criteria: SOC 2 CC6.1 requires periodic review of privileged access rights
audit_findings.condition: Privileged access reviews conducted quarterly instead of monthly as documented in policy
audit_findings.cause: Policy update not reflected in operational procedures; resource constraints in security team
audit_findings.effect: Minor deviation from documented controls; no evidence of inappropriate access during review period
audit_findings.recommendation: Align policy to quarterly review cadence or increase review frequency to monthly
audit_findings.management_response: Policy updated to reflect quarterly review cadence with enhanced scope. Approved by security committee

audit_findings.title: Vendor Risk Assessment Backlog
audit_findings.criteria: Critical vendors require annual risk assessments; high-risk vendors require semi-annual assessments
audit_findings.condition: 12 of 47 critical vendors (26%) have assessments older than 12 months; 3 high-risk vendors missed semi-annual review
audit_findings.cause: Vendor management team turnover; manual assessment process; prioritization of new vendor onboarding
audit_findings.effect: Potential unidentified vendor risks; contractual compliance gaps; customer audit inquiry exposure
audit_findings.recommendation: Clear assessment backlog by Q4 2025; implement automated assessment scheduling; hire additional vendor risk analyst
audit_findings.management_response: Backlog remediation plan approved. 8 assessments completed as of November 30; remaining 4 scheduled December

audit_findings.title: Quality Management System Gaps for SaMD
audit_findings.criteria: FDA 21 CFR Part 820 requires documented quality management system for medical device manufacturers
audit_findings.condition: Current QMS does not address SaMD-specific requirements including software lifecycle, risk management per ISO 14971, and design controls
audit_findings.cause: AI features developed under general software development processes; SaMD classification determination pending
audit_findings.effect: FDA submission timeline at risk; potential enforcement action if features marketed without clearance
audit_findings.recommendation: Engage regulatory consultant for SaMD classification; implement ISO 13485 QMS elements; establish design history file
audit_findings.management_response: Regulatory consultant engaged. SaMD classification analysis in progress. QMS enhancement roadmap under development

audit_findings.title: Clinical Validation Evidence Insufficient
audit_findings.criteria: FDA guidance for CDS software requires clinical validation demonstrating safety and effectiveness
audit_findings.condition: AI clinical decision support features deployed with internal testing only; no formal clinical validation studies conducted
audit_findings.cause: Aggressive time-to-market pressure; clinical validation expertise gap; unclear regulatory pathway
audit_findings.effect: Cannot support FDA submission; potential patient safety concerns; liability exposure
audit_findings.recommendation: Design and conduct clinical validation study; engage clinical validation partner; establish ongoing performance monitoring
audit_findings.management_response: Clinical validation study protocol drafted. IRB submission planned Q1 2026

risks.name: Series D Execution Risk

risks.name: CMS Interoperability Compliance

risks.name: State Healthcare Data Privacy Regulations
risks.description: Multi-state operations require compliance with varying state healthcare technology and data privacy regulations beyond federal HIPAA requirements

risks.description: Maintaining SOC 2 Type II attestation requires continuous control monitoring and evidence collection across security, availability, and confidentiality criteria

controls.name: PHI Encryption at Rest
controls.description: AES-256 encryption applied to all PHI data stored in databases, file systems, and backups
controls.test_procedure: Verify encryption configuration and key management practices; test data at rest encryption effectiveness
controls.evidence_required: Encryption configuration screenshots, key management audit logs, penetration test results

controls.name: PHI Encryption in Transit
controls.description: TLS 1.3 encryption enforced for all API communications and data transfers involving PHI
controls.test_procedure: SSL/TLS configuration scan; verify minimum TLS version enforcement; test certificate management
controls.evidence_required: SSL Labs scan results, network capture analysis, certificate inventory

controls.name: PHI Access Control - Role-Based
controls.description: Role-based access control system restricting PHI access to authorized personnel based on job function and minimum necessary principle
controls.test_procedure: Review RBAC configuration; test access segregation; validate minimum necessary implementation
controls.evidence_required: RBAC policy documentation, access matrix, user access reviews

controls.name: Multi-Factor Authentication
controls.description: MFA required for all system access including employee accounts, administrative access, and customer portal
controls.test_procedure: Verify MFA enrollment rates; test bypass controls; review MFA method strength
controls.evidence_required: MFA enrollment reports, authentication logs, bypass exception logs

controls.name: PHI Access Audit Logging
controls.description: Comprehensive audit logging of all PHI access, modification, and transmission events with tamper-proof storage
controls.test_procedure: Verify log completeness; test log integrity; review retention compliance
controls.evidence_required: Sample audit logs, log integrity verification, retention configuration

controls.name: Security Monitoring and Alerting
controls.description: 24x7 security monitoring with automated alerting for anomalous access patterns, potential breaches, and policy violations
controls.test_procedure: Review alert rules; test detection capabilities; verify escalation procedures
controls.evidence_required: SIEM configuration, alert samples, incident response documentation

controls.name: Privileged Access Review
controls.description: Quarterly review of privileged access rights with documented approval and recertification
controls.test_procedure: Review access review documentation; verify timeliness; test removal of inappropriate access
controls.evidence_required: Access review sign-offs, remediation evidence, exception documentation

controls.name: Multi-Region High Availability
controls.description: Platform deployed across multiple AWS regions with automatic failover capabilities ensuring continuous availability
controls.test_procedure: Review failover configuration; test regional failover; verify RTO/RPO compliance
controls.evidence_required: Architecture diagrams, failover test results, availability metrics

controls.name: Automated Capacity Scaling
controls.description: Auto-scaling infrastructure responding to load patterns with defined thresholds and performance SLAs
controls.test_procedure: Review scaling policies; load test scaling response; verify cost optimization
controls.evidence_required: Scaling configuration, load test results, capacity metrics

controls.name: Disaster Recovery Testing
controls.description: Semi-annual disaster recovery testing validating RTO of 4 hours and RPO of 1 hour
controls.test_procedure: Execute DR test scenario; measure RTO/RPO achievement; document lessons learned
controls.evidence_required: DR test plan, execution evidence, RTO/RPO measurements, remediation items

controls.name: Performance Monitoring and Alerting
controls.description: Real-time performance monitoring with SLA-based alerting for latency, throughput, and error rates
controls.test_procedure: Review monitoring coverage; validate alert thresholds; test escalation procedures
controls.evidence_required: Monitoring dashboards, alert configuration, incident response logs

controls.name: Revenue Recognition Policy Compliance
controls.description: Documented revenue recognition policies aligned with ASC 606 with mandatory compliance review for new products
controls.test_procedure: Review policy documentation; test compliance for sample contracts; verify training completion
controls.evidence_required: Revenue recognition policy, compliance checklists, training records

controls.name: SSP Documentation Review
controls.description: Standalone selling price documentation required for all performance obligations in multi-element arrangements
controls.test_procedure: Sample contract review; verify SSP documentation completeness; test allocation methodology
controls.evidence_required: SSP analysis workbooks, allocation calculations, supporting price data

controls.name: Usage-Based Billing Reconciliation
controls.description: Monthly reconciliation of usage metering data to billing system with variance investigation threshold of $1,000
controls.test_procedure: Review reconciliation documentation; verify variance investigation; test data completeness
controls.evidence_required: Reconciliation workbooks, variance analysis, remediation documentation

controls.name: AI Model Validation Framework
controls.description: Comprehensive validation framework for AI/ML models including bias testing, accuracy measurement, and documentation requirements
controls.test_procedure: Review validation documentation; verify bias testing; test accuracy metrics
controls.evidence_required: Model validation reports, bias testing results, accuracy benchmarks

controls.name: AI Model Performance Monitoring
controls.description: Continuous monitoring of AI model performance in production with drift detection and alerting
controls.test_procedure: Review monitoring configuration; verify alert thresholds; test drift detection
controls.evidence_required: Monitoring dashboards, drift alerts, model retraining logs

controls.name: Customer Health Scoring
controls.description: Automated customer health scoring with intervention triggers for at-risk accounts
controls.test_procedure: Review scoring algorithm; verify intervention triggers; test escalation procedures
controls.evidence_required: Health score reports, intervention logs, escalation documentation

controls.name: Clinical Decision Support Disclaimer Control
controls.description: Mandatory disclaimer display on all clinical decision support features with UI change control requiring regulatory review
controls.test_procedure: UI audit for disclaimer presence; verify change control compliance; test regulatory review workflow
controls.evidence_required: UI screenshots, change control records, regulatory sign-offs

controls.name: Pipeline Stage Management
controls.description: Standardized pipeline stages with defined entry/exit criteria and conversion rate tracking
controls.test_procedure: Review stage definitions; verify entry criteria compliance; analyze conversion rates
controls.evidence_required: Pipeline stage documentation, CRM configuration, conversion analytics

controls.name: Sales Forecast Review
controls.description: Weekly sales forecast review with deal-level probability validation and management override documentation
controls.test_procedure: Review forecast accuracy; verify override documentation; test probability validation
controls.evidence_required: Forecast reports, override logs, accuracy tracking

controls.name: Quota Setting Methodology
controls.description: Annual quota setting process incorporating market analysis, historical performance, and capacity planning
controls.test_procedure: Review quota methodology; verify market analysis inputs; test capacity alignment
controls.evidence_required: Quota setting documentation, market analysis, capacity models

controls.name: Vendor Risk Assessment
controls.description: Annual risk assessment for all critical vendors with semi-annual review for high-risk vendors
controls.test_procedure: Review assessment coverage; verify timeliness; test risk rating methodology
controls.evidence_required: Vendor assessments, risk ratings, remediation tracking

controls.name: Vendor Security Questionnaire
controls.description: Standardized security questionnaire required for all vendors with access to PHI or critical systems
controls.test_procedure: Review questionnaire coverage; verify response validation; test remediation tracking
controls.evidence_required: Security questionnaires, validation documentation, remediation evidence

controls.name: Quality Management System - SaMD

controls.evidence_required: PIA documentation, remediation plans, sign-off records

controls.description: Continuous collection and organization of SOC 2 control evidence with automated gathering where possible

controls.name: SOC 2 Control Testing
controls.description: Quarterly internal testing of SOC 2 controls with gap remediation tracking

controls.evidence_required: Test results, remediation tracking, effectiveness metrics

control_assessments.test_evidence: Sample of 15 AI tier contracts reviewed; 8 (53%) lacking complete SSP documentation for distinct performance obligations
Sample of 20 contracts reviewed; 19 (95%) with complete SSP documentation. One exception documented and remediated
Manual data extraction process identified; no automated reconciliation. Two billing discrepancies ($47K) found
Automated integration operational. Monthly reconciliation reviewed for May-August; all variances within threshold and documented
3 of 5 production AI models lacking complete validation documentation. Bias testing performed but not documented per policy
All 5 production models have complete validation documentation. Framework implemented and operating effectively
AI module batch processing PHI access not captured in standard logging. 30-day audit trail gap identified
Logging extended to batch processing. Log completeness verified for June-August. No gaps identified
Quota setting based primarily on growth targets without bottoms-up market sizing. 18-month underperformance pattern
12 of 47 critical vendors (26%) with assessments older than 12 months. Backlog remediation in progress
Quarterly access reviews completed for Q1-Q3. Policy updated to reflect quarterly cadence. No inappropriate access identified
QMS does not address SaMD-specific requirements. Design controls and ISO 14971 risk management not implemented

control_deficiencies.description: Revenue recognition policy not consistently applied to AI tier contracts; SSP documentation incomplete for 53% of sampled contracts
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Rapid AI tier rollout outpaced revenue accounting policy updates; insufficient training for contract administrators
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Update AI tier revenue recognition policy; implement contract review checklist; provide training to all relevant personnel

control_deficiencies.description: Usage-based billing lacks automated reconciliation control; manual process creates billing accuracy risk
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Usage-based pricing component added without corresponding billing system integration
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement automated metering integration; establish monthly reconciliation control with variance thresholds

control_deficiencies.description: AI model validation framework not consistently applied; 60% of production models lacking complete documentation
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Speed-to-market pressure; documentation requirements not enforced during rapid feature rollout
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement mandatory validation checklist; require documentation sign-off before production; conduct retrospective documentation

control_deficiencies.description: PHI access audit logging does not cover batch processing jobs; 30-day audit trail gap in AI module
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Batch processing framework uses different logging mechanism; integration oversight during AI module deployment
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Extend access logging to batch processing; implement log completeness monitoring; document gap and root cause

control_deficiencies.description: Quota setting methodology lacks market validation and capacity analysis; contributes to persistent underperformance
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Board pressure for aggressive growth; insufficient market intelligence function; limited historical data for AI tier
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement quota setting framework incorporating TAM analysis, historical win rates, and capacity constraints

control_deficiencies.description: Vendor risk assessment coverage below policy requirements; 26% of critical vendors with overdue assessments
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Team turnover; manual process; prioritization of new vendor onboarding over existing vendor reviews
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Clear assessment backlog; implement automated scheduling; hire additional vendor risk analyst

control_deficiencies.description: QMS does not address FDA SaMD requirements including design controls, ISO 14971 risk management, and design history files
control_deficiencies.root_cause: AI features developed under general software processes; SaMD classification determination pending; regulatory expertise gap
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Engage regulatory consultant; implement ISO 13485 QMS elements; establish design history files for AI features
